lines.speaker: Squire
lines.text: Hi, how can I help you?

lines.speaker: Squire
lines.text: I'm a Squire for the Void Knights.

lines.speaker: Squire
lines.text: The Void Knights, they are great warriors of balance who do Guthix's work here in Gielinor.

lines.speaker: Squire
lines.text: Entry is strictly invite only, however we do need help continuing Guthix's work.

lines.speaker: Squire
lines.text: Ah well you see we try to keep Gielinor as Guthix intended, it's very challenging. Actually we've been having some problems recently, maybe you could help us?

lines.speaker: Squire
lines.text: Well the order has become quite diminished over the years, it's a very long process to learn the skills of a Void Knight. Recently there have been breaches into our realm from somewhere else, and strange creatures

lines.speaker: Squire
lines.text: have been pouring through. We can't let that happen, and we'd be very grateful if you'd help us.

lines.speaker: Squire
lines.text: We send launchers from our outpost to the nearby islands. If you go and wait in the lander there that'd really help.

lines.speaker: Squire
lines.text: It is the name that Guthix gave to this world, so we honour him with its use.

lines.speaker: Squire
lines.text: To the Void Knight outpost. It's a small island just off Karamja.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to go to your outpost.

lines.speaker: Squire
lines.text: Hi, how can I help you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to go back to Port Sarim please.

lines.speaker: Squire
lines.text: Ok, but please come back soon and help us.

lines.speaker: Squire
lines.text: Hi, how can I help you?

lines.speaker: Squire
lines.text: This is our outpost. From here we send launches out to the nearby islands to beat back the invaders.

lines.speaker: Squire
lines.text: Recently there have been breaches into our realm from somewhere else, and strange creatures have been pouring through. We can't let that happen, and we'd be very grateful if you'd help us.

lines.speaker: Squire
lines.text: Sorry, you'll need to speak to one of the Knights about that. I'm just a humble squire with years of training still to undergo!

lines.speaker: Squire
lines.text: You must defend the Void Knight while the portals are unsummoned. The ritual takes twenty minutes though, so you can help out by destroying them yourselves! Now GO GO GO!

lines.speaker: Squire
lines.text: This island is being invaded by outsiders and the Void Knight over there is using a ritual to unsummon their portals. We must defend the Void Knight at all costs, however if you get an opening you can destroy the

lines.speaker: Squire
lines.text: There are trees on the island. You'll need to chop them down for logs and use a hammer to repair the defences. Be careful though, the trees here don't grow back very fast so your resources are limited!

lines.speaker: Squire
lines.text: Away you go then, the lander will take you back.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd better get back to it then.
